privileged_info_summary: Verified that the task requires generating a synthetic SolveSpace file (`/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/notched_panel.slvs`) from a blank sketch. The target geometry is a closed 2D profile consisting of exactly 12 line segments, forming an 80x50mm bounding box with 5x5mm square notches at all four corners, which is explicitly enforced programmatically in the verifier script's coordinate checks.
